title_en: Despite the Companion Cube Dustup, Dbrand Is Back With New Steam Machine Skins, Ranging From a Dusty Old PC Look to a Wrap That Looks Like a Basketball
body_en:
Just a few weeks after Dbrand revealed its Companion Cube was a lie (or rather that it didn't get permission to make it), the company is back with some new wraps for Valve's little cube-shaped gaming PC. They include nine fun new skins with matching Steam Controller options, among plenty of other options.
The new skins can make your Steam Machine look like a basketball, black or white dice, a brick wall, a dusty old PC, the planet Earth, and a shabby old shipping package. In addition to those, there are also many familiar skin designs that Dbrand has sold for other products over the years, like its groovy inky color blends and circuitry designs, and even a smattering of pastel, one-color options.
Here are some of the new designs:
Finally, some proper Steam Machine wraps! When it comes to Steam Machine accessories , the cosmetic kind have been hard to come by so far. You can find all of these new skins over on Dbrand's website . They come in three tiers. The Essential Kit covers just the faceplate and starts at $17.95; the Deluxe Kit is a full wrap and starts at $34.95; and the Everything Kit includes a controller skin and starts at $44.95.
